title: U.S. condemns China's 'dangerous and aggressive' acts after Philippine sailor injured at disputed shoal
summary_full: The flare-up came before Rubio is expected to visit Manila for meetings of Southeast Asian foreign ministers, with Chinese diplomat Wang Yi also in attendance.
summary_public: The flare-up came before Rubio is expected to visit Manila for meetings of Southeast Asian foreign ministers, with Chinese diplomat Wang Yi also in attendance.
